name: z_image_turbo
description: High quality turbo image generation model (8GB+ VRAM required)
group_tool_description:
This tool generates realistic/general-purpose images via ComfyUI.
Use natural language to describe the image you want. Be specific about composition, lighting, style, and subject.

Examples:
- A photorealistic portrait of an elderly man with weathered skin, dramatic side lighting
- A cozy coffee shop interior with warm morning light streaming through windows, watercolor style
- A futuristic cityscape at sunset with flying vehicles, cinematic wide shot

Note: The first generation after launching ComfyUI may take 1-2 minutes while the model loads into GPU memory. If the request times out, please retry.

The aspect_ratio parameter controls image shape: square (1:1), portrait (3:4), landscape (4:3), tall (9:16), wide (16:9). Default is square.
tool_description:
This tool generates images using the Z-Image Turbo model via ComfyUI.
Z-Image Turbo is a fast, high quality image generation model optimized for speed.
Use natural language to describe the image you want. Be specific about composition, lighting, style, and subject.

Examples:
- A photorealistic portrait of an elderly man with weathered skin, dramatic side lighting
- A cozy coffee shop interior with warm morning light streaming through windows, watercolor style
- A futuristic cityscape at sunset with flying vehicles, cinematic wide shot

Note: The first generation after launching ComfyUI may take 1-2 minutes while the model loads into GPU memory. If the request times out, please retry.

The aspect_ratio parameter controls image shape: square (1:1), portrait (3:4), landscape (4:3), tall (9:16), wide (16:9). Default is square.
